scenarios.title: CSS Design Token Usage
scenarios.evidence: All color values use var(--token-name, fallback) syntax: --button-color, --background-color, --color-gray-600, --heading-color. All font-size values use var(--token-name) syntax: --body-font-size-s, --heading-font-size-xxl. Pill border-radius uses var(--pill-radius, 40px). One hardcoded border-radius: 8px on img element (not a color or font-size token — acceptable per criteria). Hardcoded spacing (margin, padding, gap) is acceptable per project decision.

scenarios.title: ESLint Clean
scenarios.evidence: npx eslint blocks/article-hero/article-hero.js — exit code 0, zero errors, zero warnings.

scenarios.title: Stylelint Clean
scenarios.evidence: npx stylelint blocks/article-hero/article-hero.css — exit code 0, zero errors.

scenarios.title: Category Badge Text
scenarios.evidence: Category link renders with textContent 'Security' matching metadata value.

scenarios.title: Category Badge Link URL
scenarios.evidence: href equals '/en_us/blog/security.html' — constructed from lowercase category slug.

scenarios.title: Published Date Format
scenarios.evidence: time.textContent matches uppercase pattern (e.g., 'MARCH 23, 2026').

scenarios.title: Published Date <time> Element and datetime Attribute
scenarios.evidence: <time> element exists with valid datetime attribute (ISO 8601 date format).

scenarios.title: Read Time Display
scenarios.evidence: .article-hero-readtime element contains text matching /MINUTE READ/ pattern.

scenarios.title: Title Renders as h1 (In-Block)
scenarios.evidence: h1 element found within block after decoration with non-empty textContent.

scenarios.title: h1 Fallback from Document
scenarios.evidence: Block picks up document-level h1 when none exists inside block DOM — title text present in rendered output.

scenarios.title: With-Image Variant: <picture> Element Rendered
scenarios.evidence: element present in block containing child element.

scenarios.title: Hero Image Has loading=eager
scenarios.evidence: img.getAttribute('loading') === 'eager' confirmed.

scenarios.title: No-Image Variant: No Image Section in DOM
scenarios.evidence: block.querySelector('.article-hero-image') returns null when no-image class is present.

scenarios.title: No-Image Variant: Metadata and Title Still Render
scenarios.evidence: .article-hero-metadata and .article-hero-title both present in no-image variant.

scenarios.title: article-hero-loaded Class Added
scenarios.evidence: Class absent before decorate(), present after — block.classList.contains('article-hero-loaded') === true.

scenarios.title: Category Link Analytics Attribute
scenarios.evidence: a.getAttribute('data-track-analytics') === 'true' confirmed.

scenarios.title: Missing Category: Element Omitted, No Exception
scenarios.evidence: No .article-hero-category in DOM. Date and read-time still render. No exceptions thrown.

scenarios.title: Missing Published Date: Element Omitted, No Exception
scenarios.evidence: No <time> element in DOM. Category badge still renders. No exceptions thrown.

scenarios.title: Missing Read Time: Element Omitted, No Exception
scenarios.evidence: No .article-hero-readtime in DOM. Category and date still render. No exceptions thrown.

scenarios.title: All Metadata Missing: Only Title Renders, No Exception
scenarios.evidence: No category, time, or readtime elements. article-hero-loaded class applied. No exceptions.

scenarios.title: Governance Compliance (Review Agent Signoff)
scenarios.evidence: Pipeline log confirms DEV_REVIEW stage: Security verdict APPROVED (no vulnerabilities). Best-practices verdict APPROVED (Round 2 — all prior findings resolved). Both reviewers APPROVED before advancing to QA_REVIEW.

notes: Unit tests (TS-001 through TS-017) executed via MCP_DOCKER Playwright/Chromium browser. Tests loaded article-hero.js as ES module from local HTTP server; meta tags set on page document.head to match getMetadata() behavior.
ESLint and Stylelint both ran locally with zero errors (exit code 0).

CSS token audit (TS-019): All colors and font-sizes use CSS custom properties. One hardcoded border-radius: 8px exists on .article-hero-image picture img (not in scope per criteria — only colors and font-sizes evaluated). Spacing values are hardcoded per project design system decision.
Pipeline log confirms both Security and Best-Practices agents returned APPROVED during DEV_REVIEW (final round after fixes in commit 8207b87).
TS-018 (Responsive Layout visual test), TS-022 (full WTR suite run), TS-024/025/026 (Lighthouse), TS-027 (separator a11y) were not in scope for this execution batch.
